title: coronilla buxifolia
intro: Coronilla buxifolia, also known as Broom Broom or Broom Rastrera, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coronilla buxifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues, as well as to promote overall well-being.
